nasb.text: Terrors are turned against me; They pursue my honor as the wind, And my prosperity has passed away like a cloud.

esv.text: Terrors are turned upon me; my honor is pursued as by the wind, and my prosperity has passed away like a cloud.

cnv.text: 驚駭臨到我的身上， 驅逐我的尊嚴如風吹一般， 我的好景像雲一樣過去。

ccb.text: 恐惧笼罩着我， 我的尊荣随风而去， 我的荣华如云消散。
